title: Diandrostachya chevalieri
taxonomy: Diandrostachya chevalieri is classified within the family Asclepiadaceae, which is now subsumed into the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales and is a species of flowering plant in the genus Diandrostachya. This plant is native to Madagascar and is characterized by its unique features and adaptations. The classification of Diandrostachya chevalieri reflects its evolutionary relationships and placement within the broader plant kingdom. Its classification has been subject to revision as new research and discoveries continue to refine our understanding of plant taxonomy.
